concerns.text: Spec path inconsistency: plan.md header references 'specs/001-knot-complexity-analysis/spec.md' while the actual spec artifact path is 'specs/004-quantifying-the-complexity-of-knot-diagr/spec.md'. This creates ambiguity about which spec version the plan implements. Should be corrected to match the actual spec path.

Code file annotations map FRs to files (e.g., 'download_knot_atlas.py # FR-001, FR-010') but do not explicitly map Success Criteria. While FR coverage is clear, SC traceability to specific code files is implicit rather than explicit, making verification harder.

Constitution Check table lists 7 principles with implementation approaches but does not explicitly reference which spec FR/SC numbers each principle addresses. While FR-030 requires constitution compliance, explicit FR/SC mapping would improve traceability (e.g., Principle VII → FR-008, SC-011).
